steps.title: Track the singular noun
steps.content: The sentence refers to Descartes's famous phrase, so the blank needs the singular possessive phrase's. The pronoun for that singular phrase should also be singular: its complexity.

steps.title: Match possession and number
steps.content: Choice A uses a plural possessive for a single phrase. Choice B lacks the needed possessive apostrophe and uses a plural pronoun. Choice C has the singular possessive but incorrectly uses the plural pronoun their. The answer is D.
